name: Roseate Desire Has Taken The Female Sinners
description:
The more, the merrier!

So... this is the first Limbus bot I've made in months, and it's a slop bot! Woo-hoo! I just did it because a friend wanted me to make it. Life has been super busy, so I haven't really been interested in making that many bots. Did the Arknight collab stuff (idc about it), skipped all the cutscenes since I didn't care about it and just got the rewards for stuff. Have fun.

PICS OF EACH SINNER (couldn't find rodya, even she was forgotten)
